failure_asset.hypothesis_tested: fold-local supervised metric weighting plus rank-ensemble local-similarity scoring for continuous analog memory entry ranking
failure_asset.next_boundary: C0005 continuous analog memory is exhausted after nearest-neighbor mean, directional contrast, temporal-stability, target-first tail-hazard, calibrated classifier, and supervised metric-rank ensemble variants; further work should be a new major campaign hypothesis, not analog neighbor, classifier, metric, rank, daily-count, stop, target, hold, session, or threshold nudging
failure_asset.reason_not_candidate: fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence completed with 9 losing folds, 0 profitable folds, negative total tick net PnL, and negative proxy plus MT5 tick profitability despite target-range entry frequency

supporting_lessons.summary: tick execution was worse than closed-bar logic overall, with fold-isolated divergence completed and 5 tick-worse folds
supervised metric weighting and rank-ensemble local similarity did not turn C0005 analog memory into a candidate; target activity was met but all fold-isolated tick folds lost

fixed_surfaces.market: FPMarkets US100 M5 closed-bar base frame

hypothesis_variant.summary: test whether fold-local supervised metric weighting plus rank-ensemble local-similarity scoring can extract a repeatable US100 M5 analog-memory edge after mean, contrast, temporal-stability, target-first hazard, and calibrated classifier analog scores failed
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: sixth C0005 true variant; changes model family, feature metric, local-similarity geometry, score aggregation, and ranking surface to train-fold supervised metric weights plus rank ensemble; not a classifier probability, logistic C, neighbor count, analog distance, daily-count, stop, target, hold, session, or retry nudge of R0001 through R0005

notes: aggregate MT5 KPI is diagnostic only
proxy is a reference surface only; opened run commits to MT5 paired validation
closed-bar schedule replay checks proxy-vs-EA logic parity

feature.summary: continuous closed-bar price, range, wick, session, spread, and path-pressure features transformed by train-fold label-conditioned metric weights; no feature set is selected

label.summary: continuous directional favorable-path quality label for train-fold metric weighting and rank target construction; no label is selected

model.summary: fold-local train-only supervised metric weighting over continuous analog features with local nearest-neighbor diagnostics aggregated by rank ensemble; no model family is selected

trade_logic.summary: fixed-lot discovery schedule selects highest supervised metric-rank analog-memory scores per active day with spacing and schedule replay for mandatory MT5 validation
